title: murraya sumatrana
intro: Murraya sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran orange or mock orange, is a tropical evergreen shrub or small tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Murraya sumatrana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
